title: Running a Defensible Bona Fide Check
alt: Five-step process for verifying GDP customers and suppliers

items.label: Confirm legal identity
items.desc: Reconcile company name, number and address against Companies House.

items.label: Verify authorisation at source
items.desc: Check WDA(H), MIA or broker registration on the MHRA register.

items.label: Check scope and product class
items.desc: Match licence scope to the actual order, e.g. CDs or cold chain.

items.label: Validate details independently
items.desc: Confirm contact and banking via known official channels.

items.label: Record the evidence
items.desc: Save dated proof and apply ALCOA+ to the record.
